song.title: Whisper
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Your love and affection is sweeter than honey; Your Name is an ointment most fragrant of all Refreshing and soothing for me to discover; Romantic and lovely, desire of all.
[V2] 2) You wandered alone among sad human beings, You spoke words of grace sharing Your heart of love, You flowed a true balm that heals all that does ail us. Despite our poor lack, You came far from above.
[V3] 3) Your face like a flint, You held true to Your mission; Jerusalem’s pathway You fearlessly sought. Fulfilling God’s will, You delighted to do it. Forsaken by God, Your blood ran from the cross.
[V4] 4) You gave all for others, in darkness so hidden; Your work quite completed, You lay in the grave; The One who was honored was left alone quickly Asleep in a tomb in a desolate cave.
[V5] 5) All hope had just vanished and prospects departed; The daylight had faded, the earth filled with gloom. Oh Lord of my life, why so quickly You perished? Oh Lord of my love, You departed too soon.
[V6] 6) Appearing in glory, You were manifested; The third day Your kindness and love was made known, The life of res’rrection flows out through Your loving; The pow'r of ascension, my reality.
[V7] 7) When I gaze upon You, then all else does vanish; Your sweetness we taste and the world disappears. I bathe in Your love and I sense Your dear sweetness; My heart and my soul give to You all my years.
song.author: Titus Chu
